description: Drinking from the hand uses 'soeli', a small open vessel shaped to be lifted. Handles are common, not required. 'noru' (bowl) is shaped around hollow depth; a cup around drinking from the hand.
articulatory_notes: Let unvoiced 's' pass along the centre of the tongue into rounded mid-back 'o'. Keep a clear hiatus as the tongue moves forward into stressed mid-front 'e', then touch the alveolar ridge for lateral 'l' and finish on high-front 'i'.

semantic_domains.physical: a hand-sized vessel used for drinking
